sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْعُودُ مِنْ أَشْهَرِ الْآلَاتِ الْمُوسِيقِيَّةِ فِي الْعَالَمِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Oud se smatra jednim od najpoznatijih muzičkih instrumenata u arapskom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: The Oud is considered one of the most famous musical instruments in the Arab world.

sentences.arabic: لَهُ صَوْتٌ جَمِيلٌ وَعَمِيقٌ يُؤَثِّرُ فِي النُّفُوسِ.
sentences.translation: Ima lijep i dubok zvuk koji utječe na dušu.
sentences.translationEn: It has a beautiful and deep sound that touches the soul.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمَ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ الْمُوسِيقِيِّينَ الْمَشْهُورِينَ هَذِهِ الْآلَةَ فِي أَغَانِيهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi poznati muzičari koristili su ovaj instrument u svojim pjesmama.
sentences.translationEn: Many famous musicians have used this instrument in their songs.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَمْتِعُ النَّاسُ بِسَمَاعِ أَلْحَانِهِ فِي السَّهَرَاتِ الْعَائِلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi uživaju slušajući njegove melodije tokom porodičnih večeri.
sentences.translationEn: People enjoy listening to its melodies during family evenings.

sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ الْعُودُ تَارِيخًا طَوِيلًا مِنَ الْفَنِّ وَالْإِبْدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Oud predstavlja dugu historiju umjetnosti i kreativnosti.
sentences.translationEn: The Oud represents a long history of art and creativity.
